name: cyrano
description: Pre-meeting contact intelligence for AI agents. Give it an email (or the day's calendar) and it researches the person + their company across the web — punching through blocked sites via the bundled insane-search engine — then delivers a source-cited briefing (who they are, what the company does, recent signals, angles to raise) to your configured channel. Portable: any agent can install it and brief its owner before meetings.
